---
title: "Social voting advice applications — definitions, challenges, datasets and evaluation"
author: "Katakis, N., Tsapatsoulis, N., Mendez, F., Triga, V. and Djouvas, C."
date: 2014-01-01
description: "IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 44(7): 1039–1052"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
